text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, Curren Chan stops by a certain forest.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Um... If I just take this path...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That's sooo cool! ♪ There really is a
waterfall!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ack! I've gotta hurry up and take a pic! The light's
best at 6 a.m. at this time of year.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! People are already commenting! ..."What an
angel." "The definition of cute." "Divine cuteness."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Coming all the way out here was so worth
it. Now I just gotta...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan shows up for training looking a little
more tired than usual.
